parameterdescription.para: flag for keeping or rejecting the selected individuals.

briefdescription.para: Writing on a single line of a DistanceMatrix object.

briefdescription.para: Plot of a DistanceMatrix object using Gnuplot.
Test of the symmetry of a distance matrix.

briefdescription.para: Agglomerative hierarchical clustering algorithm (Kaufman & Rousseeuw, pp. 199-208).
Divisive hierarchical clustering algorithm (Kaufman & Rousseeuw, pp. 253-259).

parameterdescription.para: stream for displaying the hierarchical clustering results,
